creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
I am sending a new port for KLyX, the KDE graphical front-end to LaTeX.
The version in the ports is 0.9.3, my port is of version 0.9.8a. The
newer version contains several bug fixes and enhancements.

I have written to the port's maintainer, Hans Petter Bieker, who has
agreed I should become the maintainer for this port.
